rows.label: tlk43100246_02_msg0001
rows.name: Thanks for the Nopon Chess Set!

rows.label: tlk43100246_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Whenever I'm at home, I'm
always playing it with that
mate I told you about.

rows.label: tlk43100246_02_msg0003
rows.name:
It's pretty well made. I
bet it'll last a lifetime.

rows.label: tlk43100246_02_msg0004
rows.name:
My partner is smarter
and stronger, so I need
to work out a strategy.

rows.label: tlk43100246_02_msg0005
rows.name:
If I don't keep up a good match,
I'll fail as his partner.
